narrative:
Fayette Twp. township has 5,570 registered voters, with 60.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.2 percentage points.
